subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Jinab-i-Amín hath so praised that steadfast and upright soul that every hearer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان جناب امین چنان ستایش از آنشخص ثابت مستقیم نموده که هر سامعی
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @business; financial; property matters, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
